name: Odoo eCommerce Expert
description: Expert-level knowledge of Odoo eCommerce including product catalog and variants, public categories, pricelists and price rules, cart and checkout flow, payment providers, delivery carriers, wishlists and product comparisons, digital products, abandoned cart recovery, and SEO-optimized product pages.

prerequisites.description: Odoo ORM, security, and mail framework
Website builder, themes, pages, and portal
Sales teams and customer relationship context

capabilities.name: Product Catalog Management
capabilities.description: Publish products, configure public categories, images, descriptions, SEO metadata, and product visibility for website shoppers.

capabilities.name: Product Variants & Combinations
capabilities.description: Configure product templates with attribute lines and values, manage variant extra prices, availability, and product configurator on the shop.

capabilities.name: Pricelists & Price Rules
capabilities.description: Configure advanced pricelists, price rules, currency-based pricing, and website-specific pricelist assignment.

capabilities.name: Cart & Checkout Flow
capabilities.description: Manage sale orders created as e-commerce carts, address collection, express checkout, cart recovery, and guest checkout behavior.

capabilities.name: Payment Providers
capabilities.description: Configure payment providers, payment methods, tokens, capture modes, and transaction flow integration with sale orders.

capabilities.name: Delivery Methods & Shipping
capabilities.description: Set up delivery carriers, shipping cost rules, carrier-specific connectors, and delivery line injection during checkout.

capabilities.name: Wishlists & Product Comparisons
capabilities.description: Enable customer wishlists, comparison lists, and customer-specific product interactions tied to website visitors and portal users.

capabilities.name: Digital Products
capabilities.description: Configure downloadable products, attachments, and post-payment digital delivery through customer portal downloads.

capabilities.name: Product SEO & Shop Optimization
capabilities.description: Optimize product pages for search engines, manage sitemap entries, structured data, meta tags, and URL slugs for the shop.

limitations: Payment providers require valid acquiring credentials and may be subject to region availability
Delivery carrier live rates require carrier-specific API integration or third-party modules
Wishlist and comparison features require portal/visitor tracking and are limited to authenticated or cookied users
Abandoned cart recovery only applies to carts that have a known email or partner
Digital product downloads depend on portal attachment access and product type configuration

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial eCommerce skill based on source code analysis of website_sale, sale, product, payment, delivery, and website modules
